title: Exfoliation of Layered Transition Metal Oxides Using Novel Aqueous Exfoliants
authors: Doe, J., Smith, J., and Salguero, T.
abstract: Here, we report an efficient, high-yield soft-chemical method to exfoliate layered oxides into high-quality single-layer nanosheets using a new class of organic counter-ions. This approach significantly reduces sonication time and minimizes lattice damage, producing sheets with excellent structural integrity.

title: Synthesis and Electrochemical Properties of Doped Metal Silicate Thin Films
abstract: We describe the hydrothermal synthesis and electrochemical characteristics of manganese-doped metal silicates. Spin-coated films exhibit improved charge storage properties and cyclability, pointing toward potential applications in thin-film micro-supercapacitors.
